message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #B0B0B0
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #8A8A8A
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  BoxBorderColor black
  BoxBackgroundColor #F2F2F2
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFEDB
  NoteBorderColor #B0B0B0
  ArrowColor black
}

participant Resident
participant WeResident
participant WeID
participant WeService

== Provider Login Into Provider App ==

Resident -> WeResident : Send username:password /login

alt [Provider already exist]
  WeResident ->> WeID : Get Token by username:password\n/oauth/authorize
  WeID -->> WeResident : Return Token to WeResident
  WeResident --> Resident : Return {"token": "jwt-token"}
end

== Provider Query/Search Service ==

Resident -> WeService : Query services including token\n/weservices/services\nHeader\nAuthorization: Bear {jwt-token}

note left of Resident
Query Service schema
{"query":"string","status":12}
end note

alt [above token is valid]
  WeService ->> WeID : verify token
  WeID -->> WeService : 200
  WeService --> Resident : Response services data
  note left of Resident
Service Data Array schema
{[{"id":"string","company":"string","name":"string","rate":4.2,"image":"image.png"},{}],
"total":10,"currentPage":1,"perPage":5}
  end note
else [Token is expired/invalid]
  WeService ->> WeID : verify token
  WeID -->> WeService : 400
  WeService --> Resident : Response 401 status
end

== Create Order(Request) ==

Resident -> WeService : Create Service\nPOST: /weservices/service/{serviceID}/order

note left of Resident
Order Request schema
{"resident":"$userID",
"service":"$serviceID",
"pricingModel":{},
"noteDetail":"string",
"address":"string",
"schedule":Time}
end note

WeService ->> WeID : verify token
WeID -->> WeService : 200
WeService --> Resident : Response Service Data(JSON)

Resident -> WeService : Comment(chat) in Order\nPOST: /weservices/order/{orderID}/comment

note left of Resident
Comment Data
{"content":"string"}
end note

WeService ->> WeID : verify token
WeID -->> WeService : 200
WeService --> Resident : 200

@enduml
